subcodes.first_line: O Leaf of the divine Lote-Tree! Hearken thou unto the Call of God from the direction of the Throne of thy Lord, the All-Merciful. Verily, His Call unto thee is from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ورقه السدره ان استمعی ندآء الله عن جهه عرش ربک الرحمن ان ندائه ایاک من
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @eulogies; reminiscences
